purpose.zh: AI/LLM 架构培训、技术咨询风演示。
purpose.en: AI/LLM architecture training and consulting-style technical decks.

style.zh: 顶级咨询结构，Anthropic 橙、深空灰和流程图表达。
style.en: Top-tier consulting structure with Anthropic orange, deep slate, and process diagrams.

templateStrength: Reusable style distilled from a finished PowerPoint deck.
